headline: Take-Two Interactive set for in-line quarter as investor focus remains on GTA VI
summary: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc (NASDAQ:TTWO) is expected to deliver a largely in-line fiscal first quarter performance, with investor attention likely to remain focused on management commentary around the highly anticipated release of Grand Theft Auto VI, according to Jefferies...
